meta.title: Potato virus Y helper component protein is associated with amorphous inclusions

abstractHtml: The distribution of the helper component (HC) protein of potato virus Y in tissues and cells of infected plants was studied by immunoblotting and immunogold labelling techniques. This HC protein was found in leaf blade and vein tissue but not in the petiole of leaves. In infected cells, the protein was localized in rod-shaped cytoplasmic inclusions known as amorphous inclusions.
